content.title: Listings can now be filtered by location
content.text: Thanks to https://github.com/strech345 for adding a new feature that allows you to filter listings based on their their location. When creating a job, you can now create multiple areas in which Fredy searches for new listings

content.title: More details from the Immoscout Provider
content.text: https://github.com/MindCollaps added a new user-setting. When enabled Fredy will pull way more information for each listing from Immoscout.

content.title: Listings now marked as invisible if filtered
content.text: So far, when a listing was filtered e.g. due to being a duplicate, it was not send to you, but still shown on the map. This was now fixed.
